summary: Planned conservative classifications for 10 open PR inventory candidates. No shared canonical was selected because this is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive open PRs were scoped to route_security; non-security PRs were kept without close, merge, or fix actions.

actions.reason: Keep as related follow-up work; draft state, failing proof, and unresolved bot review block close/merge/fixed-by-candidate planning.
Standalone maintainer PR with proof and a focused diff; no duplicate/superseded evidence and merge is blocked by mode/policy.
Security-sensitive item must be quarantined read-only and handled outside ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Useful but broad standalone feature PR; no duplicate/superseded evidence and no allowed merge/fix action in plan mode.
Standalone maintainer bugfix PR; no close or merge action is allowed or justified from the inventory artifact.
Standalone maintainer bugfix PR; no duplicate/superseded evidence and no merge action is permitted.
Docs follow-up related to already-merged #74158; low-signal closeout is disabled, so keep without closure.
Related candidate fix for #72111, but closure/merge/fixed-by-candidate planning is blocked by proof status and job mode.
Related to the active session/transcript identity migration family, but this inventory shard should not choose a canonical or plan merge/fix work.
Security-sensitive item must be quarantined read-only and handled outside ProjectClownfish cleanup.
